item.title: U.S. Supreme Court rejects Trump’s attempt to end birthright citizenship
item.description: The court’s ruling means children born to undocumented immigrants in the U.S. will continue to be citizens.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: San Marcos becomes the first Texas city to ban data centers, testing its local control
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Texas education board member threatens to sue colleagues over posts calling her “Marxist”
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Paxton breaks with Texas GOP’s anti-IVF platform, saying he supports the procedure
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Screwworm: Fact vs. fiction
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Where is screwworm in Texas? Track cases here.
item.dc:creator: Berenice Garcia

item.title: Maternal health ‘deserts’ endanger some Texas women, babies
item.description: Of the more than 200 rural counties in Texas, about 70% have no hospital at all or have hospitals that don’t have facilities for delivering babies.
item.dc:creator: Public Health Watch

item.title: Texas cities forced to remove rainbow crosswalks are installing colorful alternatives
item.description: Cities and advocates are channeling support for LGBTQ+ residents into murals, lighting and rainbow-decorated sidewalks and stairs.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Ruling that blocks Trump use of system to hunt noncitizen voters won’t stop ongoing investigations
item.description: States that already ran voter rolls through the revamped federal SAVE immigration database can continue ongoing investigations of the estimated 24,000 voters it flagged.
item.dc:creator: Votebeat

item.title: Elected Officials Directory
item.description: To help Texans know more about their representatives, we’ve gathered the bios, contact information and more for the occupants of the state’s highest offices.

item.title: Government Salaries Explorer
item.description: Review the compensation of hundreds of thousands of state and municipal employees in Texas.

item.title: Texas Public Schools Explorer
item.description: Review enrollment trends, demographics, teacher experience, pay and outcomes for all schools, and more.

item.title: Texas Democrats welcome Bernie Sanders and plunge into kitchen-table politics
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Harris County immigrant legal services program paused as court battle continues
